examples: MOG : MOG is a music blog network that encompasses more than 300 blog posts per week.
And the one-in-a million mog has featured on TV shows such as "Strange, Freaky, True".

If you care at all for classical music, you should be far happier with MOG.
The MOG desktop interface and mobile application are incredibly intuitive and without distracting features.
